description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, vented hem, and has a graphic print on the front in a distressed lookFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do you hate it when poeple stare at you for no reason? It's time to give it back to losers who think they can check you out and get away with it. Wear this blue tantra tee which asks people if they need glasses, and perhaps they'll get the point! Team it with jeans or shorts and don't forget to wear your attitude!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
